blockers.description: Plan 06 marked autonomous: false — needs `npm run dev` running concurrently with `npm run test:chat`
PostgreSQL not running locally (long-standing v1.0 blocker, not Phase 21-specific)

human_actions_pending.action: Start `npm run dev` in a terminal so resuming agent can browser-verify Plan 05 and run Plan 06 E2E tests

decisions.decision: Use OpenAI-style tool calling for chat endpoint
decisions.rationale: Separates free-form markdown replies from structured canvas actions

decisions.decision: Use micromark + DOMPurify for markdown rendering via CDN ESM
decisions.rationale: Vanilla JS project has no bundler; esm.sh and jsDelivr are reliable

decisions.decision: Switch public/app.js to script type=module for ESM imports
decisions.rationale: Required to import micromark from esm.sh

decisions.decision: Set default max_tokens to 4096 for chat role
decisions.rationale: Removes artificial length constraints and allows thorough task-oriented replies
Matches existing chat sidebar affordances; avoids nested-interactive issues on mobile

decisions.decision: Keep .chat-action-summary as graceful-degradation fallback when only actions[] is present
decisions.rationale: Handles older session messages restored before this plan landed

decisions.decision: Use emoji icons in ACTION_FEEDBACK_ICONS rather than SVG sprites
decisions.rationale: Zero asset cost; matches existing chat-action-icon styling

decisions.decision: Capture actionResults BEFORE updateChatMessage in chat handler
decisions.rationale: Assistant message renders feedback cards on first paint, not after a re-render — eliminates flicker

next_action: Resume with '/gsd-resume-work' or '/gsd-execute-phase 21' after starting `npm run dev`. First: read .planning/phases/21-chat-to-canvas/.continue-here.md, browser-verify Plan 05, then commit and proceed to Plan 06.
context_notes: Waves 1+2 (Plans 01-04) shipped in commit 0f85b18. Plan 05 (Fallback & Action Feedback) is fully implemented in working tree — applyVoiceActions returns result array, executeCanvasAction returns descriptors for zoom branches, chat handler captures actionResults before render, normalizeChatActionResults + ACTION_FEEDBACK_ICONS + escapeHtml helpers added, .chat-action-feedback CSS shipped, i18n keys added. Pending: browser smoke test, commit, then Plan 06 (E2E verification — 12+ scenarios — autonomous: false, needs dev server).
